"}] [{"avoid_statement_family": ["Do not use the finite-composition helper with a separately inferred `constantCoeff X = 0` when a direct `HasSubst.X'` proof is ava
warnings.generated_cue: (X : K⟦X⟧) g = g := by have hX0 : constantCoeff (X : K⟦X⟧) = 0 := by simp ext n rw [fps_comp_coeff g (X : K⟦X⟧) hX0 n] apply finsum_eq_single (fun d => coeff d g * coeff n (X ^ d)) n ?_
warnings.recommendation: Prefer `have ha : HasSubst (X : K⟦X⟧) := HasSubst.X'`; `ext n`; `rw [coeff_subst' ha g n]`; `simp only [coeff_X_pow, smul_eq_mul]`; then `rw [finsum_eq_single _ n (fun d hd => by simp [hd.symm])]`; `simp`.
